# ResetWell Plus

> ResetWell Plus is India's expert-led online platform for perimenopause and menopause care. It offers virtual consultations with menopause specialists, a free symptom checker, educational events, and a private community for women in midlife. Consultations start at Rs 1,599. The platform serves women across India (English and Hindi) and was co-founded by Reshma Tiwari, a certified menopause coach, and Swati Singh, author of the book Menopause & Me.

Key facts:
- One in three Indian women navigate perimenopause without a diagnosis; ResetWell Plus provides specialist care designed for them.
- Services: menopause and perimenopause consultations (online), hormone replacement therapy (HRT) guidance, symptom assessment, workplace wellness programmes for corporates.
- Care is delivered by clinicians who specialise in women's midlife health.
- Contact: via the form at https://www.resetwellplus.com/contact

## Understand your symptoms

- [Perimenopause 101](https://www.resetwellplus.com/understand-your-symptoms/perimenopause-101): What perimenopause is, common symptoms, why it happens, and what helps, for women in India.
- [Symptom checker](https://www.resetwellplus.com/understand-your-symptoms/symptom-checker): Free 5-minute perimenopause self-assessment, no sign-up required.
- [Knowledge centre](https://www.resetwellplus.com/understand-your-symptoms/knowledge-centre): Evidence-based articles on sleep, HRT, nutrition, mood, and bone health.

## Get care

- [How it works](https://www.resetwellplus.com/get-care/how-it-works): The consultation process from booking to personalised plan.
- [Our specialists](https://www.resetwellplus.com/get-care/our-specialists): The clinicians behind ResetWell Plus.
- [Pricing](https://www.resetwellplus.com/get-care/pricing): Consultation fees, starting at Rs 1,599.
- [Book a consultation](https://www.resetwellplus.com/get-care/book-a-consultation): Book an online visit with a menopause specialist.

## Community and events

- [Join the community](https://www.resetwellplus.com/community/join): Free, private, moderated space for women in midlife.
- [Stories of Reset](https://www.resetwellplus.com/community/stories-of-reset): Real experiences from women who found care.
- [FAQs](https://www.resetwellplus.com/community/faqs): Common questions on HRT safety in India, menopause age in India, payments, and consultations.
- [Upcoming events](https://www.resetwellplus.com/events/upcoming): Live, expert-led online sessions.
- [Workplace wellness](https://www.resetwellplus.com/about/workplace-wellness): Menopause awareness and support programmes for employers.

## About

- [Our story](https://www.resetwellplus.com/about/our-story): Why ResetWell Plus exists.
- [Reshma Tiwari](https://www.resetwellplus.com/about/reshma-tiwari): Co-founder, certified menopause coach.
- [Swati Singh](https://www.resetwellplus.com/about/swati-singh): Co-founder and author of Menopause & Me.
- [The book](https://www.resetwellplus.com/book): Menopause & Me: It's Time to Reclaim Your Life, by Swati Singh, available on Amazon.

## Important notes

- Content on the site is educational and not a substitute for medical advice; consultations with qualified specialists are the clinical service.
- The daily quote on the homepage changes each day (Indian Standard Time).
